title: selaginella latifolia
intro: Selaginella latifolia, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella latifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. Selaginella latifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also sometimes used in traditional Asian medicine to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems.
